duas.title: Ghair Maroof - Ziyarat Ashura
duas.description: This form of ziyarah on the `Ashura' Day is not as famous (ghair maroof)as the earlier one; rather, it is similar to it in reward and merits although it does not comprise the one-hundred time statements of invoking curse on the enemies and invoking blessings on the Imam and his companions. The method of this form of ziyarah, as quoted from the book of al-Mazar al-Qadim, without mentioning the explanatory introduction, is as follows: If you would like to visit Imam al-Husayn (peace be upon him) from remote places or from the vicinity of his holy tomb, you may bathe yourself and come out to a desert or go up the roof on your house. You may then offer a two-unit prayer, reciting (after Surah al-Fatihah) Surah al-Tawhid in both units. When you accomplish the prayer, you may point to Imam al-Husayn (peace be upon him) to greet him. The greetings, pointing, and intention must be made while turning the face towards the side of Imam al-Husayn’s tomb. Then, you may say the following words with reverence and submission:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلْبَشِيرِ ٱلنَّذِيرِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the bearer of glad tidings and the warner
and son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خِيَرَةِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خِيَرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya khiyarata allahi wabna khiyaratihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O choicest of Allah and son of His choicest.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah and son of His vengeance.
Peace be upon you, O he who has not been avenged so far.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْهَادِي ٱلزَّكِيُّ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O guide and pure leader,
and upon souls that gathered in your courtyard,
resided in your vicinity,
and came with your visitors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنِّي مَا بَقيتُ وَبَقِيَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka minni ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu
segments.translation: Peace be upon you from me as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
Unbearable is the commiseration for you
and gross is it for the believers, Muslims,

segments.arabic: وَفِي أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَأَهْلِ ٱلأَرَضِينَ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa fi ahli alssamawati wa ahli al-aradina ajma`ina
segments.translation: and for all the inhabitants of the heavens and the layers of the earth.

segments.transliteration: fa'inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una
segments.translation: So, we are Allah’s and to Him shall we return.

segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi wa barakatuhu wa tahiyyatuhu
segments.translation: Allah’s benedictions, blessings, and greetings

segments.arabic: عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْحُسَيْنُ
segments.translation: be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah al-Husayn,
upon your fathers the immaculate and finely selected,
and upon your offspring the guide and well-guided.
May Allah curse the people who disappointed you
and abstained from supporting and aiding you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ لَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi lakum
segments.translation: May Allah curse the people who laid the basis of persecution against you,
paved the way for transgression against you,

segments.transliteration: wa tarraqat ila adhiyyatikum wa tahayyufikum
segments.translation: opened the way towards injuring and wronging you,

segments.transliteration: wa jarat dhalika fi diyarikum wa ashya`ikum
segments.translation: and spread so in your lands and against your adherents.

segments.arabic: بَرِئْتُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ وَإِلَيْكُمْ
segments.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi `azza wa jalla wa ilaykum
segments.translation: I declare my repudiation in the presence of Allah the Almighty and All-majestic, and in the presence of you,

segments.transliteration: ya sadati wa mawaliyya wa a'immati
segments.translation: O my masters, chiefs, and leaders,

segments.transliteration: minhum wa min ashya`ihim wa atba`ihim
segments.translation: from them, their adherents, and their followers.

segments.arabic: وَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي أَكْرَمَ يَا مَوَالِيَّ مَقَامَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha alladhi akrama ya mawaliyya maqamakum
segments.translation: And I beseech Allah Who has honored your position, O my chiefs,
and enhanced your status and standing,

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُكْرِمَنِي بِوِلاَيَتِكُمْ وَمَحَبَّتِكُمْ وَٱلٱِئْتِمَامِ بِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: an yukrimani biwilayatikum wa mahabbatikum wali'timami bikum
segments.translation: to endue me with the honor of being loyal to you, bearing love for you, choosing you as my leaders,
and declaring repudiation from your enemies.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلْبَرَّ ٱلرَّحِيمَ أَنْ يَرْزُقَنِي مَوَدَّتَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha albarra alrrahima an yarzuqani mawaddatakum
segments.translation: And I beseech Allah the Benign and Merciful to endow upon me with fondness of you,
to grant me success of demanding with your vengeance

segments.arabic: مَعَ ٱلإِمَامِ ٱلْمُنْتَظَرِ ٱلْهَادِي مِنْ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: ma`a al-imami almuntazari alhadi min ali muhammadin
segments.translation: with the awaited and guiding leader from the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yaj`alani ma`akum fi alddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: to include me with you in this world and the Hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يُبَلِّغَنِيَ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yuballighani almaqama almahmuda lakum `inda allahi
segments.translation: and to make me attain the praiseworthy position that you enjoy with Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha `azza wa jalla bihaqqikum
segments.translation: And I beseech Allah the Almighty and All-majestic, in the name of your right

segments.transliteration: wa bilshsha'ni alladhi ja`ala allahu lakum
segments.translation: and in the name of the status that you enjoy with Him,
to grant me, on account of my commiseration for you,
the most favorable of that which He has ever granted to any one afflicted with a misfortune.

segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una
segments.translation: To Allah do we belong and to Him shall we return.
What a terrible misfortune it was;

segments.arabic: مَا أَفْجَعَهَا وَأَنْكَاهَا لِقُلُوبِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُسْلِمينَ
segments.transliteration: ma afja`aha wa ankaha liqulubi almu'minina walmuslimina
segments.translation: how a calamitous and painful misfortune it was for the hearts of the believers and Muslims.

segments.transliteration: fa'inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una
segments.translation: So, to Allah do we belong and to His shall we return.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and make me, in this situation of mine,

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ صَلَوَاتٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ
segments.transliteration: mimman tanaluhu minka salawatun wa rahmatun wa maghfiratun
segments.translation: one of those who receive blessings, mercy, and forgiveness from You
and make me worthy of regard with You

segments.transliteration: fi alddunya wal-akhirati wa min almuqarrabina
segments.translation: in this world and in the Hereafter and of those drawn near to You,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni ataqarrabu ilayka bimuhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: for I seek nearness to You through Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
Your blessings be upon him and upon all of them.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa inni atawassalu wa atawajjahu
segments.translation: O Allah, I also choose as means to You and I turn my face towards You
in the name of Your select from among Your creatures
and Your elite from Your beings;
namely, Muhammad, `Ali, and the immaculate ones from their offspring.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: So, O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
decide my lifestyle to be the same as theirs
and my death to be the same as theirs,

segments.transliteration: wa la tufarriq bayni wa baynahum
segments.translation: and never separate me from them
in this world and in the Hereafter.
You are verily Hearer of prayers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَهٰذَا يَوْمٌ تُجَدَّدُ فِيهِ ٱلنِّقْمَةُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa hadha yawmun tajaddada fihi alnniqmatu
segments.translation: O Allah, on this day, imprecation is renewed
and curses are poured down

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ ٱللَّعينِ يَزِيدَ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ يَزِيدَ
segments.translation: on the accursed Yazid and on the family of Yazid

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ آلِ زِيَادٍ وَعُمَرَ بْنِ سَعْدٍ وَٱلشِّمْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala ali ziyadin wa `umara bni sa`din walshshimri
segments.translation: as well as on the family of Ziyad, `Umar ibn Sa`d, and al-Shimr.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْهُمْ وَٱلْعَنْ مَنْ رَضِيَ بِقَوْلِهِمْ وَفِعْلِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma il`anhum wal`an man radiya biqawlihim wa fi`lihim
segments.translation: O Allah, pour curses upon them all and upon him who has approved of their words and deeds

segments.transliteration: min awwalin wa akhirin la`nan kathiran
segments.translation: from the past and the last generations; (and pour down on them) copious curses,
expose them to the heat of Your Fire,

segments.transliteration: wa askinhum jahannama wa sa'at masiran
segments.translation: and lodge them in Hellfire; and how an evil destiny it is,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْجِبْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ كُلِّ مَنْ شَايَعَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa awjib `alayhim wa `ala kulli man shaya`ahum
segments.translation: disclose (Your chastisement) to them and to all those who adhered to them,

segments.transliteration: wa baya`ahum wa taba`ahum wa sa`adahum
segments.translation: paid homage to them, patterned after them, helped them,
and approved of their deeds;
and lay open to them and on them
as well as on every one who has approved of that deed of them

segments.arabic: لَعَنَاتِكَ ٱلَّتِي لَعَنْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ ظَالِمٍ
segments.transliteration: la`anatika allati la`anta biha kulla zalimin
segments.translation: Your curses with which You have cursed all wrongdoers,

segments.transliteration: wa kulla ghasibin wa kulla jahidin
segments.translation: all usurpers, all deniers,

segments.transliteration: wa kulla kafirin wa kulla mushrikin
segments.translation: all unbelievers, all polytheists,

segments.arabic: وَكُلَّ شَيْطَانٍ رَجِيمٍ وَكُلَّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa kulla shaytanin rajimin wa kulla jabbarin `anidin
segments.translation: all accursed devils, and all obstinate potentates.

segments.transliteration: allahumma il`an yazida wa ala yazida
segments.translation: O Allah, pour curses upon Yazid, the family of Yazid,
and all the descendants of Marwan.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa da``if ghadabaka wa sakhataka
segments.translation: O Allah, multiply Your wrath, ire,
torment, and chastisement

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ أَوَّلِ ظَالِمٍ ظَلَمَ أَهْلَ بَيْتِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: `ala awwali zalimin zalama ahla bayti nabiyyika
segments.translation: for the first transgressor who wronged the Household of Your Prophet.
O Allah, pour curses upon all those who persecuted them
and (please) expose them to Your chastisement.
Verily, You inevitably chastise the criminals.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَٱلْعَنْ أَوَّلَ ظَالِمٍ ظَلَمَ آلَ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wal`an awwala zalimin zalama ala bayti muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, pour curses upon the foremost transgressor who wronged the members of Muhammad’s household,

segments.transliteration: wal`an arwahahum wa diyarahum wa quburahum
segments.translation: and (pour curses) upon their souls, abodes, and graves;

segments.arabic: وَٱلْعَنِ ٱللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعِصَابَةَ ٱلَّتِي نَازَلَتِ ٱلْحُسَيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wal`an illahumma al`isabata allati nazalat alhusayna
segments.translation: and pour curses, O Allah, upon the gang who encountered al-Husayn
the son of Your Prophet’s daughter

segments.transliteration: wa harabat-hu wa qatalat ashabahu wa ansarahu
segments.translation: and who fought against him and killed his companions, supporters,
aides, loyalists,
adherents, lovers,
household, and progeny.
And also pour curses, O Allah, upon those who robbed his possessions,
despoiled his women,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yasma`u kalamahu wa la maqalahu
segments.translation: and did not listen to his words and discourse.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَٱلْعَنْ كُلَّ مَنْ بَلَغَهُ ذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wal`an kulla man balaghahu dhalika faradiya bihi
segments.translation: O Allah, pour curses upon every one who, when informed about that, was pleased with it
from the past and the last generations
and from all the creatures up to the Judgment Day.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْحُسَيْنُ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah al-Husayn
and upon those who helped and aided you

segments.arabic: وَوَاسَاكَ بِنَفْسِهِ وَبَذَلَ مُهْجَتَهُ فِي ٱلذَّبِّ عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa wasaka binafsihi wa badhala muhjatahu fi aldhdhabbi `anka
segments.translation: and those who offered themselves for you and sacrificed their souls in defense of you.
Peace be upon you O my master, upon them,
upon your souls, upon their souls,
upon your soil, and upon their soils.
O Allah, (please) make them find mercy, pleasure,
happiness, and bounty.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O my master Abu-`Abdullah,
O son of the seal of the Prophets,
O son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors,
O son of the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا شَهِيدُ يَا بْنَ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O martyr and son of the martyr.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْهُ عَنِّي فِي هٰذِهِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ
segments.translation: O Allah, convey at this very hour,

segments.arabic: وَفِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ وَفِي هٰذَا ٱلْوَقْتِ
segments.transliteration: wa fi hadha alyawmi wa fi hadha alwaqti
segments.translation: on this day, in this moment,

segments.transliteration: wa kulli waqtin tahiyyatan wa salaman
segments.translation: and in every moment, to him greetings and salutations from me.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the worlds
and upon those who were martyred with you;

segments.arabic: سَلاَماً مُتَّصِلاَ مَا ٱتَّصَلَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ
segments.transliteration: salaman muttasilan ma ittasala allaylu walnnaharu
segments.translation: such peace that is as connected as day and night.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon al-Husayn the son of `Ali the martyr.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ علىٰ عليِّ بنِ ٱلْحُسَينِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn the martyr.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ علىٰ ٱلْعَبَّاسِ بنِ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala al`abbasi bni amiri almu'minina alshshahidi
segments.translation: Peace be upon al-`Abbas the son of the Commander of the Faithful the martyr.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَدَاءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala alshshuhada'i min wuldi amiri almu'minina
segments.translation: Peace be upon the martyrs from the sons of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَدَاءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ جَعْفَرٍ وَعَقِيلٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala alshshuhada'i min wuldi ja`farin wa `aqilin
segments.translation: Peace be upon the martyrs from the sons of Ja`far and `Aqil.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ مُسْتَشْهَدٍ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon every faithful believer who was martyred.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and convey to them greetings and salutation from me.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s Messenger.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayka alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
May Allah console you satisfactorily
regarding your son al-Husayn, peace be upon him.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا ٱلْحَسَنِ يَا أَمِيرَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya aba alhasani ya amira almu'minina
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Abu’l-Hasan the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayka alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي وَلَدِكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu laka al`aza'a fi waladika alhusayni
segments.translation: May Allah console you satisfactorily regarding your son al-Husayn.
Peace be upon you, O Fatimah,
O daughter of the Messenger of the Lord of the Worlds.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayki alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكِ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي وَلَدِكِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu laki al`aza'a fi waladiki alhusayni
segments.translation: May Allah console you satisfactorily regarding your son al-Husayn.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنُ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayka alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي أَخِيكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu laka al`aza'a fi akhika alhusayni
segments.translation: May Allah console you satisfactorily regarding your brother al-Husayn.
Peace be upon the souls of the believing men and women,
both the alive and the dead.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayhim alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon them.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمُ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي مَوْلاَهُمُ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu lahum al`aza'a fi mawlahum alhusayni
segments.translation: May Allah console them satisfactorily regarding their chief al-Husayn.
O Allah, (please) include us with those who shall demand with his vengeance

segments.arabic: مَعَ إِمَامٍ عَدْلٍ تُعِزُّ بِهِ ٱلإِسْلاَمَ وَأَهْلَهُ
segments.transliteration: ma`a imamin `adlin tu`izzu bihi al-islama wa ahlahu
segments.translation: with a just leader through whom You may confer might on Islam and its people,
O Lord of the Worlds.

segments.text: You may then prostrate and say the following words

segments.translation: O Allah, all praise be to You

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ مَا نَابَ مِنْ خَطْبٍ
segments.translation: for all adversaries that have afflicted us.
All praise be to You for all matters.
The complaint about the gross distresses
that afflicted Your select ones and Your intimate servants is addressed to You alone.

segments.arabic: وَذٰلِكَ لِمَا أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُمْ مِنَ ٱلْكَرَامَةِ وَٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْكَثِيرِ
segments.transliteration: wa dhalika lima awjabta lahum min alkaramati walfadli alkathiri
segments.translation: This is on account of the honor and abundant favor that You have decided for them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: So, O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي شَفَاعَةَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ يَوْمَ ٱلْوُرُودِ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni shafa`ata alhusayni `alayhi alssalamu yawma alwurudi
segments.translation: endue me with the intercession of al-Husayn, peace be upon him, on the Day of Coming (to You),
the witnessed standing, and the approached pond.
Decide for me with You a step of honesty

segments.arabic: مَعَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ وَأَصْحَابِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: ma`a alhusayni wa ashabi alhusayni `alayhi alssalamu
segments.translation: with al-Husayn and the companions of al-Husayn, peace be upon him,
who offered him their souls,
sacrificed themselves in defense of him,
and fought against his enemies with him,
seeking Your pleasure, placing their hope in You,
believing in Your promise,
and fearing from Your threat.
You are verily Benignant to whom You wish,
O most merciful of all those who show mercy
